data.content: Implementation already complete and merged to main. All features (agent outcome stats with JSONL storage, success classification based on queue state transitions, error-exit rollback + retry with different agent) are implemented and tested (7 tests passing). Key commits: 698d4757 (error retry), b3acd4ba (stats + success classification), 15d8d971 (JSONL concurrent safety), bc1963b8 (merge to main).
